textByHash.0c55dd154b106b3556bfbd93c064c00b3a7b3457: I really hope you can help me. Please show me the object my song is about!
textByHash.151cd6717c9b9dfb5d24b1d6766431273817cf4e: Yes yes yes! That is it, thank you so much . The memories have come flooding back. I get why the lyrics are what they are now.
textByHash.1a11acd60825dacdfc148dc4b6f496a4d6b34b3b: Well we're not in Rellekka down here so I don't think it matters too much.
textByHash.362a0e99352d9cbfb85596539f003f93d2146652: Hi there . I am Falo the bard! Like my brother Olaf, who lives in Rellekka, I also write music.
textByHash.3c4a97b7cbd0dce20b999ed5b012d754b2ddf016: You have very kind words. I would be extremely grateful if you could remind me which object the song was about.
textByHash.3ea12fea6bb237bd54fa73dbe43cec103f18f61a: Hi there exile. I am Falo the bard! Like my brother Olaf, who lives in Rellekka, I also write music.
textByHash.5764a7cb20b77774c9de1b77033c80b1983165b4: Hi there . I am Falo the bard! Like my brother Olaf, who lives in Rellekka, I also write music.
textByHash.63d78db632c2207bd93a2f7b3cf3b27b5b3054fc: No no no! That's not it. Please have another think about it.
textByHash.77e2bebd5bd3fde6c251a1bde6afd6a4745f45c4: I am afraid not. It saddens me deeply, so I often send out messages to adventurers to help me discreetly.
textByHash.82377d2a598ab1312e83b52768919bbb007e5485: Get away! I do not speak to outlanders.
textByHash.82eafa84afbac38b62d988ad75e62df6dfdad833: I have one problem though. I am very forgetful, I can never remember which particular object a song was about.
textByHash.93ed622df914b51f1cb122ced551c8a2a4e79406: Oh most certainly! I write about all the objects in the lands. From weapons and armour to palm trees and sands. That's why I wander far from Rellekka to seek inspiration.
textByHash.9a6fc58f7936cabdab129f18fe694a1d3a1f85e9: I have one of my old songs stuck in my head, but I cannot remember what the object it refers to is. I am so forgetful. I'll sing it to you.
textByHash.b1fd5a1f23498fdd32b874fa304533a4e93c9274: Thank you for coming , I need your help.
